titleStmt.title: SII 29.223: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 223. (A.R. No. B. 767 of 1962-63.) GORṬA, BHALKI TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar setup in the field of Mahadevappa Kaṇakaṭe.
It records the death of the jaina muni Tribhuvana-sēna-Siddhāntadēva who is highly praised. The famous jaina centre Kopaṇagiri is mentioned in the record. [No. 236/A.R. 762 below].
The record is dated in Bhūlōkavarsha 5 Sādhāraṇa, Śravaṇa, ba. 7, Monday corresponding to 1130 A.D., July 28, Monday [Śaka 1052].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© bhūyādā vīrasēnasya vīrasēnasya śāsanaṁ .
bhūyādā vīrasēnasya vīrasēnasya śāsanaṁ .
Ābibhūta manōbhava madavibhavaṁ rāddhāṁtara
tna kopaṇagiriyappa navagaṇa varanesedaṁ
tribhuvanasēnaṁ munīṁdra tāmarasēnaṁ .
śrī maccāḷukya vaṁśāgraṇiyenisida bhūlōka
varṣaṁ gataydānāmaṁ sādāraṇābdaṁ śravaṇa ba
huḷadoḷsaptami sōmavāra tāmettaṁ krō
ḍiloḷpiṁ suragati vaḍada bhāvatātma svarūpa
kāmapraduṁ saka (lōdrō) tribhuvana varasēnākhya
siddhāṁtadēvar . Antastatvada khalmeḻuninti tribhu
vanasusēna muni sarakkantaṁ māḍalsalelō
kāntikadiṁ bharoḷeṣaḍḍidaṁ da diṁdaṁ . Ābīma
varū payavvana viḷāsa samanvitadēva suṁda
rī prabhavasu (bhāva) haraḷa madāṁbina sau
khyamavēmaveṁdu kaṁ munipaṁ
tarātmanoḷeniṁdu subōdhadoḷānde
cittamitribhuvana sēna divya munipaṁ paḍe
daṁ paramātma(ṁ) tatvamaṁ . Anavarataṁ śrīma
tribhuvana sēna muni poddanamaḷa caritaṁ
śuddhātmanoḷāndi pavi nta nimiṣa nā
daṁge doldā lō(kaṁ) vīraroḷ . © ©
Digital edition of SII 29.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
